ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sets" (
  "set_num" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each set */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the set */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Release year of the set */,
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the theme the set belongs to */,
  "num_parts" INTEGER /* Number of parts in the set */,
  "num_minifigures" INTEGER /* Number of minifigures in the set */,
  "piece_count" INTEGER /* Total piece count of the set */,
  "original_price" TEXT /* Original price of the set */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the set */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("set_num"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sets_theme_id FOREIGN KEY ("theme_id") REFERENCES themes ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "themes" (
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theme */,
  "theme_name" TEXT /* Name of the theme */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the theme */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* Image URL for the theme */,
  "parent_theme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent theme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Release year of the sets */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parts" (
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each part */,
  "set_num" TEXT /* Reference to the set the part belongs to */,
  "part_name" TEXT /* Name of the part */,
  "part_type" TEXT /* Type of the part (e.g., brick, plate, mini-figure) */,
  "part_color" TEXT /* Color of the part */,
  "part_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the part in the set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parts_set_num FOREIGN KEY ("set_num") REFERENCES sets ("set_num")
)

CREATE TABLE "mini_figures" (
  "mini_figure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mini-figure */,
  "set_num" TEXT /* Reference to the set the mini-figure belongs to */,
  "mini_figure_name" TEXT /* Name of the mini-figure */,
  "mini_figure_type" TEXT /* Type of the mini-figure (e.g., male, female, neutral) */,
  "mini_figure_accessories" TEXT /* Accessories of the mini-figure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mini_figure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mini_figures_set_num FOREIGN KEY ("set_num") REFERENCES sets ("set_num")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., collector, administrator, moderator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "set_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who collected the set */,
  "set_num" TEXT /* Reference to the set collected */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the set was collected */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the set (e.g., new, used, mint) */,
  "purchase_price" TEXT /* Price paid for the set */,
  "purchase_location" TEXT /* Location where the set was purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_set_collections_set_num FOREIGN KEY ("set_num") REFERENCES sets ("set_num"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_set_collections_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "set_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "set_num" TEXT /* Reference to the set the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_set_versions_set_num FOREIGN KEY ("set_num") REFERENCES sets ("set_num")
)

CREATE TABLE "set_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the set */,
  "set_num" TEXT /* Reference to the set rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the set was rated */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text accompanying the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_set_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_set_ratings_set_num FOREIGN KEY ("set_num") REFERENCES sets ("set_num")
)

CREATE TABLE "set_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the set */,
  "set_num" TEXT /* Reference to the set reviewed */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text written by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the set was reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_set_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_set_reviews_set_num FOREIGN KEY ("set_num") REFERENCES sets ("set_num")
)

CREATE TABLE "set_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the tag */,
  "set_num" TEXT /* Reference to the set tagged */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag text assigned by the user */,
  "tag_date" TEXT /* Date when the set was tagged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_set_tags_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_set_tags_set_num FOREIGN KEY ("set_num") REFERENCES sets ("set_num")
)

CREATE TABLE "set_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who commented on the set */,
  "set_num" TEXT /* Reference to the set commented on */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment text written by the user */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the set was commented on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_set_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_set_comments_set_num FOREIGN KEY ("set_num") REFERENCES sets ("set_num")
)

CREATE TABLE "set_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "set_num" TEXT /* Reference to the set the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of the image (e.g., front, back, side) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_set_images_set_num FOREIGN KEY ("set_num") REFERENCES sets ("set_num")
)

CREATE TABLE "set_keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword event */,
  "set_num" TEXT /* Reference to the set the keyword belongs to */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword text assigned to the set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_set_keywords_set_num FOREIGN KEY ("set_num") REFERENCES sets ("set_num")
)
